verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All He wants is you, No one else will do. Not just a part, He wants all of your heart. All He wants is all of you; All He wants is you.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All He wants is me, Unreservedly. Not just a part, He wants all of my heart. All He wants is all of me; All He wants is me.
